name: spacex-launch-gap-calendar
description: A simple aggregated view of all SpaceX launches on a calendar. Shows days that haven't had a launch as well as reference to which launches happened on that day

scripts.install-hooks: [ -d .git/hooks ] && cp scripts/hooks/pre-push .git/hooks/pre-push && chmod +x .git/hooks/pre-push && echo 'Git hooks installed.' || echo 'Skipping git hooks (no .git/hooks directory).'
